entities.name: DedupePlan
entities.context: Data structure holding groups of duplicate workout observations to be resolved

entities.name: apply_plan
entities.context: Function that executes a deduplication plan against a SQLite database, deleting duplicate observations and orphaned workouts

entities.name: workout_observations
entities.context: SQLite database table storing workout observation records, subject to deduplication

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database engine used to store workout and observation data

entities.name: DedupGroup
entities.context: Data structure representing a single group of duplicate records, with canonical IDs and lists of duplicates to remove

relationships.context: apply_plan consumes a DedupePlan to determine which observations and workouts to delete
DedupePlan contains a list of DedupGroup instances
apply_plan takes a sqlite3.Connection and executes DELETE statements against it
apply_plan deletes duplicate rows from the workout_observations table
Each group tracks canonical_obs_id and duplicate_obs_ids referencing workout_observations records
